en: I'll tell you when I love you, then I'll tear you away
Just pretend I didn't dare your way Breathe, breathe, breathe, out of the way, out of the way
Stop it, stop it, stop it, stop it Don't do that, don't, you're making a mess
Ow, ow, fuckity ow God, Brynn, when do I get that friggin' spinal tap thing?
It's called a spinal block and you can't have it yet, honey The doctor said you're not dilated enough
ko: 척추 차단이라고 하고, 아직 할 수 없어, 자기야.

en: Oh, come on, I mean, it's like I have to wait for it to get worse?
Why can't I just have the friggin' thing now? Honey, doctors are sadists who like to play God
ko: 왜 지금 당장 그걸 받을 수 없는 거야?

en: and watch lesser people scream Oh, shit
ko: 그리고 덜 중요한 사람들이 비명을 지르는 걸 지켜보는 걸 좋아해.

en: Excuse me, hey, can we get my kid the damn spinal tap already? Brynn!
You're a part-time love friend, a full-time friend
The monkey on your back is the latest trend I don't see what anyone can see
